description_long: This is a vintage-style open-face helmet with a predominantly white, slightly weathered exterior, showing signs of wear and scuff marks. The helmet features a bold orange lightning bolt graphic on the top, and prominent black text reading '#CHANGEMAKERCC' on both sides. A small Canadian flag decal is visible on one side, along with a blue circular sticker. The helmet's edge is lined with a black trim, and the interior padding is dark and appears well-used, with ear flaps and a chin strap for securing the helmet. The surface is dimpled and matte, suggesting a fiberglass or composite shell, and the helmet lacks a visor but has visible fastener snaps along the brow.
description: A weathered white open-face helmet with an orange lightning bolt, black text, and Canadian flag decals, featuring black trim and interior padding.
description_view_0: Left side view showing '#CHANGEMAKERCC' text, a Canadian flag decal, a blue sticker, and visible scuff marks.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open face, black interior padding, chin strap, and the orange lightning bolt on top.
description_view_2: Right side view with '#CHANGEMAKERCC' text, partial '#EXPERIENCE' text near the edge, and visible fastener snaps.
description_view_3: Rear/top view highlighting the orange lightning bolt and the helmet's dimpled, worn white surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue circular sticker with a green and white emblem is present on the left side of the helmet, but no recognizable brand logo is visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features an orange lightning bolt on top, black '#CHANGEMAKERCC' text on both sides, a Canadian flag decal, a blue circular sticker, and partial black text near the edge. The style is bold and graphic with a focus on text and simple motifs.
